author: Brian Kirst
review: New manager Morgan is amazing. All previous reviews were due to bad manager previous to Morgan. Trust me! I lived here for three years. Former manager Charlene was not a great fit for the apartments. She was very difficult and not a great

author: Kelsey
review: Moldy, cheap, slow response to repair requests, and worst of all: property manager is neurotic and one of the strangest and most aggressive people I have ever had the misfortune of dealing with.

author: Jamie Alvarez
review: Definitely one of the cleanest and cheapest laundry facilities I've seen at apts.

author: Ty-Hawk Sabin (HomicidalNinjha)
review: Be very careful renting here. Small apartments, high rent, rude landlord. You have to ask a hundred times to have anything fixed and even than they will clam you are harassing them. My elderly mom lives here. The landlord has harassed, me

author: kevin curtis
review: Very small and old, no a/c and only baseboard heat.  No parking controls, some people have multiple vehicles and if anyone has guests there may be no parking for you when you come home.  Its been 2 months since my move out and I still

author: Campn_ Pro
review: Apt manager very unprofessional. Small place. Parking issues. I like the location though. Somewhat quiet.

entral heat. No maintenance man..they use contract labor, but you can't get anything fixed.

author: Jim Mercer
review: Buy a van and live down by the river before ever considering moving to this dump!
